title: Megalastrum palmense
taxonomy: Megalastrum palmense is classified within the family Ophioglossaceae, commonly known as the adder's tongue fern family. This plant belongs to the genus Megalastrum, which is a genus of ferns. The species M. palmense is native to South America, specifically in countries such as Brazil and Peru. It is a type of epiphytic fern, meaning it grows on other plants such as trees. The classification of M. palmense is further detailed within the kingdom Plantae, kingdom, division Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida.
